name: Gimmick Puppet Twilight Joker
name_jp: ギミック・パペット－ナイト・ジョーカー
desc: When a "Gimmick Puppet" monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to your Graveyard: You can banish that monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use the effect of "Gimmick Puppet Twilight Joker" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When a "Gimmick Puppet" monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to your Graveyard: You can banish that monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use the effect of "Gimmick Puppet Twilight Joker" once per turn.
eff: When a "Gimmick Puppet" monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to your Graveyard: You can banish that monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use the effect of "Gimmick Puppet Twilight Joker" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
